  • Method Details

    • initialize

      public void initialize(ServiceConfiguration cfg)
      Description copied from class: KeYCrossReferenceSourceInfo
      Called by the service configuration indicating that all services are known. Services may now start communicating or linking among their configuration partners. The service configuration can be memorized if it has not been passed in by a constructor already.
      Specified by:
      initialize in interface Service
      Overrides:
      initialize in class KeYCrossReferenceSourceInfo
      Parameters:
      cfg - the service configuration this services has been assigned to.

    • getType

      public Type getType(TypeReference tr)
      Description copied from interface: SourceInfo
      Returns the referred type.
      Specified by:
      getType in interface SourceInfo
      Overrides:
      getType in class KeYCrossReferenceSourceInfo
      Parameters:
      tr - a type reference.
      Returns:
      the referred type (may be null).

    • getType

      public Type getType(VariableSpecification vs)
      Description copied from interface: SourceInfo
      Returns the type for the variable specification. Implementors should ensure that, if vs is an EnumConstantSpecification, the call is delegated to getType(VariableDefinition).
      Specified by:
      getType in interface SourceInfo
      Overrides:
      getType in class DefaultSourceInfo
      Parameters:
      vs - a variable specification.
      Returns:
      the type for that variable (may be null).

    • resolveURQ

      public Reference resolveURQ(UncollatedReferenceQualifier urq)
      does not resolve the urq, just returns the argument
      Specified by:
      resolveURQ in interface SourceInfo
      Overrides:
      resolveURQ in class DefaultSourceInfo
      Parameters:
      urq - an uncollated reference.
      Returns:
      a resolved reference, or null if the reference could not be resolved.
